name: Heartland
description_short: Wisconsin-based credit union offering home, auto, and business loans plus savings accounts and certificates to member-owners. NCUA-insured with 90 years of operation.
description_long:
Heartland Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union operating in Wisconsin with a 90-year history of serving its community. The organization is federally insured by the NCUA and operates multiple branch locations across Wisconsin including DeForest, Dodgeville, East Washington Ave, High Crossing, Lancaster, Oregon, Platteville, Rimrock Road, Struck Street, Williamson Street, and Verona.

Heartland provides a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans, home mortgages, home equity loans, business loans, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit. The credit union currently advertises auto loans starting at rates as low as 4.74% APR with promotional offers including 0% APR financing with zero payments for 90 days on eligible vehicle purchases and refinances (April-May 2026). They offer certificates with rates up to 3.95% APY and provide mortgage pre-approval services with digital application capabilities.

Heartland distinguishes itself through convenience features like Round Up Savings (automatic savings with debit card purchases), virtual appointment scheduling via their Digital Branch, and loan protection products covering life, disability, unemployment, hospitalization, and family medical leave. The credit union emphasizes accessibility with both in-branch and digital banking options, and provides a claims process for payment protection products through TruStage.

As a credit union, Heartland operates on a member-benefit model rather than shareholder profits, theoretically offering more competitive rates than commercial banks. However, membership requirements and availability are not detailed on their public website, and specific eligibility criteria for their promotional offers require individual application review. The site demonstrates active marketing of time-limited promotional rates, suggesting competitive rate positioning in their market.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.74% APR (promotional 0% APR available April-May 2026)
Home mortgage loans with free pre-approval letters and digital application process
Home equity loans (second mortgages) at competitive rates
Business loans for commercial and agricultural purposes
Savings accounts and share accounts for member-owners
Certificates of deposit with rates up to 3.95% APY
Round Up Savings automatic savings program linked to debit card purchases
Payment protection insurance (life, disability, unemployment, hospitalization, medical leave coverage)
Virtual/Digital Branch appointment scheduling and digital account management
Loan protection claim filing services through TruStage
pros: NCUA federal insurance on member deposits provides equivalent protection to FDIC banking insurance
0% APR promotional auto loans with 90 days no payments available (April-May 2026 promotion)
Automated Round Up Savings feature makes saving seamless with every debit card transaction
Multiple loan protection products including life, disability, unemployment, and medical coverage options
11 physical branch locations across Wisconsin plus Digital Branch virtual appointment services
Certificate rates up to 3.95% APY on 7 or 14-month special rate products
Free mortgage pre-approval letters to strengthen home purchase offers
cons: Website does not clearly state membership eligibility requirements or how to join
Promotional rates (0% APR auto loans) are time-limited to specific periods and require creditworthiness approval
Standard auto loan rates after promotional period range from 4.74% to 19.24% APR, showing wide variation based on credit quality
Limited geographic footprint to Wisconsin only; not a national credit union option
Website lacks specific information about business loan terms, minimum loan amounts, or application requirements
best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking competitive auto and home loans with flexible digital and in-branch services
Homebuyers wanting free mortgage pre-approval letters and competitive home equity loan options
Members who value automated savings features and comprehensive loan protection insurance products
Business owners in Wisconsin looking for local credit union commercial lending relationships
diagnosis: Heartland Credit Union is best for Wisconsin residents seeking member-owned banking with competitive auto, home, and business loans plus comprehensive loan protection products. Primary caveat: membership eligibility requirements are not disclosed on their public website, and promotional rates are temporary and credit-dependent, so actual rates will vary significantly by individual creditworthiness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Heartland — Credit Union in HUTCHINSON, KS | CreditDoc
meta_description: Heartland — NCUA-insured credit union in HUTCHINSON, KS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
